title: Argentine banks testing JPMorgan's JPM Coin to speed up settlements
message_html: Argentine banks testing JPMorgan's JPM Coin to speed up settlements ...
snippet: Argentine lenders are reportedly testing JPMorgan’s JPM Coin to improve settlement speed and efficiency, even as the central bank maintains restrictions on crypto services.
